title: The Empty Taxi
content: Late one rainy evening, Sophia noticed a taxi parked outside her apartment with its lights on but no driver inside. The vehicle remained there for nearly twenty minutes, attracting curious attention from nearby residents. Eventually, the driver returned carrying two cups of coffee. He explained that his passenger had asked him to wait while collecting luggage from a nearby building. The mystery disappeared instantly, replaced by smiles from everyone who had imagined far more complicated explanations.
